case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. CARLOS RAMON ALVARADO CARCAMO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-21-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IN IS PRESENT.
